assertions.title: Learner summaries and reusable knowledge are generated after runs

steps.observed: Delivery Runs section found with 'No delivery runs yet.'

steps.action: Search for Knowledge section in UI
steps.observed: No Knowledge section found in the Autopilot tab UI

evidence.consoleErrors: Many Unauthenticated OIDC errors and response.clone errors in console, but UI still renders

assertions.issues: Cannot test learner summaries because no delivery runs have been completed. The Delivery Runs section shows 'No delivery runs yet.' Learner summaries require completed runs to generate.

assertions.title: Digests and alerts are generated for recurring autopilot conditions

steps.observed: Autopilot tab selected with Settings, Product Program, Delivery Runs, Research, Ideas, Swipe sections

steps.action: Search for Digests section in UI
steps.observed: No Digest section found in the Autopilot tab UI
No matching text found for knowledge/digest/learner/summary

evidence.consoleErrors: Many Unauthenticated OIDC errors and response.clone errors in console

assertions.issues: Cannot test digests and alerts because no digest section is visible in the UI. Either the feature is not implemented yet or digests have not been triggered for this project.

assertions.title: Release-health failures trigger rollback or revert handling

steps.action: Search for Release Health section in UI
steps.observed: No Release Health section found in the Autopilot tab UI

evidence.consoleErrors: Many Unauthenticated OIDC errors and response.clone errors in console

assertions.issues: Cannot test release-health rollback because no release-health section is visible in the UI. Also, there are no merged delivery runs with health check failures to trigger rollback. Prerequisite not met: no merged runs with health check failures exist.

assertions.title: End-to-end product loop is reachable from project navigation

steps.observed: Autopilot Test Project visible in sidebar
Autopilot tab selected, shows Settings, Product Program, Research, Ideas, Swipe sections

steps.action: Check Research section - Run Research button
Check Ideas section - Add Idea button
steps.observed: Add Idea button remains DISABLED even after filling idea title

steps.action: Existing ideas visible with swipe buttons
steps.observed: 3 ideas visible in Swipe Review section with Pass/Maybe/Yes/Now buttons
Idea marked as 'Approved', 'Swiped yes — Idea now approved' message shown, Recent Swipes shows 1 YES

steps.action: Check Delivery Runs for created work
steps.observed: Delivery Runs section still shows 'No delivery runs yet.' - NO delivery run created

evidence.consoleErrors: Many Unauthenticated OIDC errors, response.clone errors, and Maximum call stack size exceeded errors

assertions.issues: E2E product loop is broken at the idea->delivery-work step. Swiping an idea YES marks it as approved but does NOT create a delivery run. The Delivery Runs section persists showing 'No delivery runs yet.' This indicates the idea->planning->delivery flow is not wired up correctly.

frictions.description: Run Research button is disabled and Add Idea button is disabled - cannot create new ideas or run research in the UI
frictions.resolution: Using existing pre-populated ideas in the swipe queue instead

frictions.description: Console shows many Unauthenticated OIDC token errors - background API calls failing with auth issues
frictions.resolution: UI still renders despite auth errors, suggesting polling fallback behavior

frictions.description: Console shows 'response.clone is not a function' errors repeatedly

blockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-039 blocked: No completed delivery runs exist to generate learner summaries
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Cannot create runs - E2E flow (VAL-CROSS-001) is broken at idea->delivery-work step

blockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-040 blocked: No digest section visible in UI and no digests exist
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked entire Autopilot tab UI, no digest-related section found

blockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-041 blocked: No release-health section visible in UI and no merged runs with health failures exist
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Cannot test rollback - no merged runs exist, E2E flow is broken

blockers.description: VAL-CROSS-001 failed: E2E product loop incomplete - idea->delivery-work flow not working
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Swiped an idea YES - idea marked approved but no delivery run created

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 0 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-001), 3 blocked (VAL-AUTOPILOT-039/040/041). VAL-CROSS-001 E2E loop fails at idea->delivery-work step: swiping YES marks idea as approved but creates no delivery run. VAL-AUTOPILOT-039/040/041 are blocked by missing prerequisites (no completed runs, no digests, no release-health failures). Many console errors (Unauthenticated, response.clone issues) but UI still renders.
